# Jinmen Culture – Illusion Engineering & Immersive Shows

## About Jinmen Culture
Shanghai-based company specializing in immersive magic shows, illusion engineering, and original IP for brands, venues, and events across China.

## Services
- Immersive Magic Shows (微醺秀) – 45-min social magic shows for bars, hotels, corporate events
- Illusion Engineering – Custom illusion devices for escape rooms, malls, brand activations
- Original IP –原创IP productions including "Ghost of the Circus"
- Brand Shows – Custom immersive performances for corporate events

## Key Pages
- Homepage: https://jinmenculture.com
- Weixunxiu Show: https://jinmenculture.com/weixunxiu.html
- Illusion Engineering: https://jinmenculture.com/engineering.html
- Ghost of the Circus: https://jinmenculture.com/ghost.html
- Brand Shows: https://jinmenculture.com/shows.html
- Contact: https://jinmenculture.com/contact.html

## FAQ
Q: What immersive magic shows do you offer?
A: Weixunxiu (45-min social magic show) and Ghost of the Circus (90-min immersive horror show).

Q: Do you create custom illusion devices?
A: Yes, we design custom illusion mechanisms for escape rooms, malls, museums, and brand events.

Q: How can I book a show?
A: Contact us via WeChat (Alex-lives) or email (1379197706@qq.com).
